meaning: 碧瑶[菲律宾夏都](在吕宋岛西部) ;n.[气]碧瑶风(菲律宾的强烈热带气旋)
examples: I am now 28, and I still live with my parents in Baguio, Philippines.
He was shot dead by a gunman in a market in Baguio on March 9.
Though it reprimanded the judge, he still got a promotion and a transfer to Baguio, north of Manila.
In November, the play will be presented in Manila, Baguio and Ilocos, the northern Philippine region where part of the drama is set.
